/**
 * Calculate the total price for a cart, applying a percentage discount.
 *
 * @param {Array<{price: number, qty: number}>} items - The cart items.
 * @param {number} discountPct - The discount percentage to apply (0-100).
 * @returns {number} The discounted total.
 */
function calculateTotal(items, discountPct) {
  const subtotal = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price * item.qty, 0);
  return subtotal - subtotal * (discountPct / 100);
}
